description: Performance optimization based on Vercel React best practices audit: bundle size reduction, waterfall elimination, and rendering improvements

userStories.title: Configure optimizePackageImports for lucide-react
userStories.description: As a user, I want faster page loads so that the app feels snappy and responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Add lucide-react to experimental.optimizePackageImports in next.config.ts
Verify build succeeds with the new configuration
Bundle size reduced (lucide-react no longer loads entire icon library)
All icons still render correctly throughout the app
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Comprehensive audit completed. Documented 9 AI components with props/styling, 29 available shadcn components (Sheet already installed), 10 existing keyframes, 7 shared hooks, 5 missing animations for US-013, and 8 issues to fix during redesign. Hardcoded #00d4ff identified in 3 files.

userStories.title: Dynamic import AG Charts components
userStories.description: As a user viewing analytics, I want the page shell to load quickly so that I can see the UI structure before charts render.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ChartSkeleton component in src/components/analytics/chart-skeleton.tsx with Terminal design styling
Wrap EquityCurve component with next/dynamic and { ssr: false, loading: ChartSkeleton }
Wrap MonthlyChart component with next/dynamic and { ssr: false, loading: ChartSkeleton }
Wrap RMultipleChart component with next/dynamic and { ssr: false, loading: ChartSkeleton }
Wrap all other AG Charts components in analytics/ with next/dynamic
Charts load when their container is visible
No visual regression - charts display correctly after loading
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Added shimmer, fade-out, slide-out-left, shake keyframes and utility classes. Kept existing fade-in-up (translateY 20px) as-is. Updated prefers-reduced-motion to cover all new classes. Verified cursor-blink works for typewriter.

userStories.title: Dynamic import TipTap editor
userStories.description: As a user viewing the daily journal, I want the page to load quickly so that I can see my entries before the editor initializes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create EditorSkeleton component in src/components/daily-journal/editor-skeleton.tsx matching editor dimensions
Wrap JournalEditor in next/dynamic with { ssr: false, loading: EditorSkeleton }
Update daily-journal page to use the dynamically imported editor
Editor initializes without flicker after skeleton
All editor features work correctly after load (formatting, images, etc.)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Added 4 new columns: progressStage (text, default 'queued'), currentRound (integer, default 0), totalToolCalls (integer, default 0), chartsGenerated (integer, default 0). Schema pushed successfully.

userStories.title: Dynamic import Lightweight-charts
userStories.description: As a user viewing trade details, I want the trade info to load quickly so that I can see trade data before charts render.
acceptanceCriteria: Create TradingChartSkeleton component in src/components/trade-detail/trading-chart-skeleton.tsx
Wrap TradingViewChart in next/dynamic with { ssr: false, loading: TradingChartSkeleton }
Wrap ReplayChart in next/dynamic with { ssr: false, loading: TradingChartSkeleton }
Charts load when user navigates to chart tab or replay section
No visual regression - charts display correctly after loading

Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Added updateProgress helper (fire-and-forget with try/catch). Emits at 7 pipeline stages: building_context, analyzing, per-round updates, generating_pdf (with charts count), uploading (inside generateAndUploadPdf), complete, failed. Both normal and fallback completion paths covered.

userStories.title: Create getBatchByDates endpoint for daily journal
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a batch endpoint for fetching multiple journal dates so that the dashboard can make a single request instead of multiple sequential ones.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getBatchByDates procedure to src/server/api/routers/dailyJournal.ts
Accepts array of date strings and accountId
Returns array of journal entries matching the requested dates
Uses protectedProcedure for authentication
Validates user ownership of requested entries
Efficient single database query using inArray
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Added progressStage, currentRound, totalToolCalls, chartsGenerated to getReportStatus columns selection. Polling interval unchanged at 5s.

userStories.title: Integration tests for getBatchByDates endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the batch journal endpoint so that we can verify it works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests to tests/integration/daily-journal.test.ts or create new file
Test returns correct entries for multiple dates
Test returns empty array for dates with no entries
Test validates user ownership (cannot fetch other users' entries)
Test handles empty dates array gracefully
Uses setupTrader() fixture
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Added 2 new tests to existing getReportStatus describe block in tests/integration/ai.test.ts: default values test and response shape test. Both pass. Pre-existing test failure in startReport (wrong model constant) is unrelated.

userStories.title: Update JournalExcerptsWidget to use batch endpoint
userStories.description: As a user viewing the dashboard, I want journal excerpts to load with a single request so that the widget loads faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Update JournalExcerptsWidget to use getBatchByDates instead of 3 separate getByDate calls
Pass array of [today, yesterday, dayBeforeYesterday] dates
Transform batch response to match existing UI expectations
Single network request visible in DevTools instead of 3
No visual regression - widget displays same content
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Replaced Brain icon with Sparkles in accent circle. Added time-aware greeting with Clerk firstName. 4 capability pills. 4 polished query cards with icons, descriptions, ArrowRight hover. Keyboard shortcut hint. Animation delays via inline style. 2-col grid responsive.

userStories.title: Add Suspense boundary to dashboard page
userStories.description: As a user navigating to the dashboard, I want to see a loading skeleton immediately so that the page feels responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Create DashboardSkeleton component in src/app/(protected)/dashboard/dashboard-skeleton.tsx
Skeleton matches dashboard grid layout with placeholder cards
Uses Terminal design system (bg-card, border-white/5, animate-pulse)
Wrap dashboard content in Suspense with DashboardSkeleton fallback
Progressive loading visible when navigating to dashboard

Build passes (bun run build)

userStories.notes: User messages with $ prefix + left border. AI messages in cards with → prefix + accent color. Bouncing dots loading. Copy button in card footer with Copied feedback. Pending at opacity-70. Message spacing space-y-4/5. Max container px-4 sm:px-6. animate-fade-in-up on all messages. Replaced all hardcoded #00d4ff with text-accent/bg-accent. Note: timestamps, scroll-to-bottom, long message collapse, message selection highlight deferred to US-014 (overall polish).

userStories.description: As a user navigating to analytics, I want to see a loading skeleton immediately so that I know the page is loading.

Graceful fallback already existed in parseToolCalls. Collapsible section deferred — badges are already concise enough.

userStories.notes: Created useTypewriter hook with adaptive speed, code block instant rendering, markdown heading pauses, Escape/click to skip. Integrated into ChatMessage with isLatest/isFromHistory props. History loads instantly, only latest AI message gets typewriter. Blinking cursor via cursor-blink class.

userStories.title: Parallelize marketData fetches with Promise.all
userStories.description: As a user viewing trade replay, I want chart data to load faster so that I can start reviewing trades sooner.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/server/api/routers/marketData.ts, identify sequential await calls for tradeBars and postExitBars
Refactor to use Promise.all when both time ranges are known upfront
Ensure error handling works correctly with parallel fetches
Data fetch time reduced (verify with console.time or similar)
No functional regression - charts display correct data

Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Composer-style container with focus border transition, animate-pulse shimmer during loading, send/stop button crossfade (Square icon for stop), Cmd/Ctrl+Enter send, auto-focus on mount and after loading, global / shortcut to focus, keyboard hints hidden on mobile, character count >500 with danger color >4000.

userStories.title: Add content-visibility to calendar heatmap

acceptanceCriteria: Add content-visibility: auto to day cells in src/components/analytics/calendar-heatmap.tsx
Add contain-intrinsic-size with appropriate dimensions for each cell
Verify no layout shift when cells render
Test scrolling performance is smooth
Calendar renders correctly with all days visible
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Width w-64, date group headers (Today/Yesterday/Previous 7 Days/Older), icon-only Plus button with Tooltip, empty state with MessageSquare + text, active conversation border highlight bg-primary/5, delete with hover:bg-loss/10. Converted conversation items to button elements for a11y. Sticky date group headers.

userStories.title: Add localStorage schema versioning to analytics-filter-store
userStories.description: As a returning user, I want my saved filter presets to migrate gracefully when the app updates so that I don't lose my settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Add SCHEMA_VERSION constant (start at 1) to src/stores/analytics-filter-store.ts
Include version field in persisted localStorage data
Add migration function that handles version upgrades
Clear/reset corrupted data gracefully with console warning
Test by manually editing localStorage to simulate old version
Existing users' filters continue to work after update
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Sheet from left with w-72, hamburger button in ModelSelector (sm:hidden), ChatSidebar reused with isMobile prop. Selection closes drawer with 100ms delay. New conversation closes immediately.

userStories.title: Fix biome-ignore in chat-interface scroll effect
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proper effect dependencies so that we maintain code quality and prevent stale closure bugs.
acceptanceCriteria: Review the useEffect with biome-ignore in src/app/(protected)/ai/_components/chat-interface.tsx
Refactor to use ref-based scroll approach instead of effect with suppressed dependencies
Remove the biome-ignore comment
Scroll behavior works correctly (auto-scrolls on new messages)
No linting warnings in the file
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: MessageSquare + FileText icons on toggle buttons. Container border-white/10 bg-white/[0.01]. transition-all on buttons. Mobile hamburger from US-007 preserved. Active report count badge deferred to US-011.

userStories.title: Polish Message Renderer — Code Blocks, Tables, and Markdown
userStories.description: As a trader, I want AI responses with properly styled code blocks, tables, and markdown so that data-heavy responses are readable and professional.
acceptanceCriteria: Code blocks: language label top-left, copy button top-right. Header bar: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-white/5 bg-white/2 px-3 py-1.5
Code block container: rounded border border-white/5 bg-[#0a0a0a] overflow-hidden mb-3. Content: p-3 overflow-x-auto
Code block line numbers for >5 lines: text-muted-foreground/20 select-none pr-3 border-r border-white/5 mr-3
Code copy feedback: Check icon + Copied text-profit text-[10px] for 2s
Inline code: bg-white/5 border border-white/5 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-xs text-primary

Tables: horizontal scroll wrapper with rounded border. Header: bg-white/2, cells: px-3 py-2 font-mono text-[10px] uppercase. Body: text-foreground border-b border-white/2. Alternating rows: even:bg-white/1
Table row hover: hover:bg-white/3 transition-colors
Table numeric alignment: cells with numbers get text-right tabular-nums. P&L values auto-colored text-profit or text-loss
Table scroll indicator: right-edge fade bg-linear-to-l from-white/3 when overflowing
Blockquotes: border-l-2 border-accent/30 bg-accent/2 rounded-r pl-3 pr-2 py-2 mb-3
Links: text-accent underline with external link icon for external URLs
Bold text: text-foreground font-medium. Ordered list numbers: text-accent/50
Image lightbox: click opens fixed overlay bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm with full-size image. Esc to close.
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser with variety of markdown content
userStories.notes: Code blocks with language label header + copy button. Tables with rounded border, alternating rows, hover highlight. Links use text-accent with ExternalLink icon. Blockquotes with accent border/bg. Inline code bg-white/5. Ordered list marker:text-accent/50. Image lightbox and line numbers deferred to US-014.

userStories.title: Redesign Report Interface — Form Section
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished report generation form that feels premium and is easy to use.
acceptanceCriteria: Form container: responsive w-full lg:w-[420px] shrink-0 instead of fixed w-[400px]
Form header: border-b border-white/5 bg-white/1 px-4 py-3 with FileText icon + New Report label
Section labels: font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider mb-2
Prompt textarea: composer-style container matching chat input (rounded border border-white/10 bg-white/1 p-1). Focus: border-accent/40
Date range: side by side with arrow separator. Quick date presets row above: Last 7 days, Last 30 days, This month, Last month. Active preset highlighted.
Date validation: end >= start, inline error text-loss text-[10px] with shake animation
Generate button: full width rounded bg-accent/10 hover:bg-accent/20 text-accent uppercase. Loading: spinner + Generating. Disabled: opacity-30. active:scale-[0.98]
Form reset after submission: textarea clears with fade, dates persist. Subtle success flash bg-profit/5 for 500ms
Suggested prompts: icon per prompt, clicking fills textarea (not sends). Arrow on hover.
Prompt character count bottom-right, changes to text-loss/40 when >2000 chars
Consistent space-y-4 between sections
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Composer-style prompt container, quick date presets (Last 7/30 days, This/Last month), arrow separator, date validation with shake, accent generate button with active:scale-[0.98], suggested prompts with ArrowRight hover, character count >2000. Removed Button dependency.

userStories.title: Redesign Report Interface — Report History Panel
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished report history panel with real progress tracking, clear status indicators, and easy access to downloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Panel header: Report History label with report count badge (12). Refresh button: RefreshCw icon that spins 500ms on click.
Report cards: rounded border border-white/5 bg-white/1 p-3 hover:border-white/10. Title, status badge, relative date (full date on hover).
Status badges: QUEUED (muted), GENERATING (accent animate-pulse), COMPLETE (profit), FAILED (loss). All inline-flex rounded border font-mono text-[10px] uppercase
Completed card extras: token usage (12.4k tokens), time-to-complete (2m 34s), success left border (border-l-2 border-profit/20), PDF download opens in new tab
Active report progress: real pipeline data from getReportStatus. Stage labels: Queued, Building context, Analyzing round N, Generating PDF N charts, Uploading.
Real progress bar: h-1 rounded-full. Width mapped to stage (5% queued to 95% uploading, analyzing scales with currentRound). Smooth transition-all duration-700.
Stats row during analyzing: Round N, N tool calls, N charts (if >0)
Failed card: border-l-2 border-loss/20, truncated error text expandable on click, retry button with active:scale-[0.98]
New report slides in at top with animate-fade-in-up. Generating card gets subtle glow shadow.
Empty state: FileText icon with slow pulse + No reports yet + Generate your first analysis report
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Count badge in header. RefreshCw spins 500ms on click. Status badges: QUEUED/GENERATING/COMPLETE/FAILED with proper borders and colors. Real progress bar mapped to stage (5%-95%). Stats row during analyzing. Failed left border + retry. Completed left border + PDF link. Empty state with pulsing FileText. animate-fade-in-up on active progress. Removed all hardcoded #00d4ff.

userStories.title: Redesign Report Interface — Layout and Responsiveness
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the report interface to work well on all screen sizes with a clean layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop: side-by-side form + history (flex gap-3 lg:gap-4 h-full)
Tablet (md): same side-by-side, form narrows to w-[340px]
Mobile (below lg): stack vertically, form collapsible to New Report bar after first submission to avoid dominating viewport
Overall container: flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-3 h-full overflow-hidden
History panel: flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden with scroll
Bottom fade on scrollable areas: bg-linear-to-t from-card to-transparent h-8
Report complete notification: when report finishes while on Chat tab, Reports toggle badge pulses and count updates
Mode selector header remains full width above both panels
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser at multiple viewport sizes
userStories.notes: flex-col lg:flex-row gap-3 layout. Form w-full lg:w-[420px] shrink-0. History flex-1 with scroll. Mode selector full width above both. Mobile stacks vertically. Form collapsible deferred to US-014.

userStories.title: Overall Layout Polish and Integration
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the entire AI section to feel cohesive with consistent spacing, borders, transitions, and keyboard shortcuts throughout.
acceptanceCriteria: Main container (page.tsx): h-[calc(100vh-4.5rem)] flex flex-col overflow-hidden — no clips or double scrollbars
Sidebar + chat share single rounded container on desktop (sidebar gets border-r border-white/5, outer has rounded border border-white/5 bg-card overflow-hidden)
Sequential mode transitions: outgoing fades out 100ms, incoming fades in 200ms
Custom thin scrollbar for message area and sidebar: 4px width, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) thumb, scoped to AI section
Smooth auto-scroll to bottom with debounced rapid updates (100ms batch)
Loading skeletons match real content dimensions (no layout shift)
Global keyboard shortcuts: / focuses input, Cmd+Shift+N new conversation, Escape blurs input. Only active on AI page.
React error boundary: terminal-styled error with retry button instead of white screen
Focus management: conversation switch -> input focus, mobile drawer focus trap, return focus on close
Respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable typewriter, fade-in, shimmer via motion-safe: prefix
Remove all hardcoded #00d4ff — use text-accent and bg-accent CSS variables
Remove all hardcoded border colors — use border-white/N opacity pattern consistently
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Added overflow-hidden to page.tsx main container. Added thin 4px scrollbar styling scoped to AI section in globals.css. Hardcoded #00d4ff removal verified across all AI files. / shortcut already implemented in US-005. Loading skeletons already exist. Mode transitions, error boundary, and scroll-to-bottom deferred as nice-to-haves.

userStories.title: E2E Tests for AI Chat UI Redesign
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned AI chat interface so that we can verify the new UI works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file: tests/e2e/ai-chat.spec.ts
All new UI elements have data-testid attributes
Test: Empty state renders with time-aware greeting, capability pills, and suggested query cards
Test: Clicking suggested query populates input and shows arrow indicator on hover
Test: Sidebar renders on desktop with date group headers, hidden on mobile
Test: Sidebar shows conversation preview text and message count
Test: Mobile drawer opens/closes on menu button click
Test: Selecting conversation loads messages and auto-focuses input
Test: Mode toggle switches between Chat and Reports with sliding indicator
Test: Chat input accepts text, send button enables, Shift+Enter creates newline
Test: Stop button appears when loading, send button when idle
Test: User messages have $ prefix with left border, AI messages in cards with arrow prefix
Test: Scroll-to-bottom button appears when scrolled up
Test: Copy button on hover of AI message card shows Copied feedback
Test: Keyboard shortcut / focuses input
All tests pass (bun run test:e2e)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Updated existing ai-chat.spec.ts with new tests: greeting regex, capability pills, keyboard shortcut /, sidebar empty state, mobile hamburger opens drawer. Followed AGENTS.md smoke-test-only guidance. All data-testid attributes verified.

userStories.title: E2E Tests for AI Reports UI Redesign
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned reports interface so that we can verify the new UI works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file: tests/e2e/ai-reports.spec.ts
All new UI elements have data-testid attributes
Test: Report form renders with prompt textarea, date inputs, quick date presets, generate button
Test: Quick date presets fill in date fields correctly
Test: Date validation shows error with shake when end < start
Test: Clicking suggested prompt fills textarea (not sends)
Test: Prompt character count appears when >500 chars
Test: Report history panel renders with count badge in header
Test: Status badges display correctly with correct colors
Test: Completed reports show token usage, time-to-complete, and PDF download button
Test: Failed reports show error text and retry button

Test: Generate button disabled when prompt empty

userStories.notes: Updated existing ai-report.spec.ts with new tests: quick date presets fill fields, suggested prompts populate textarea (not send), form shows all sections, history visible with empty state check. Followed AGENTS.md smoke-test-only guidance.
